stages.purpose: Identify the authoritative organization and distinguish it from the distractor.

arguments.query: site:kingsmere-transit.fixture 2025 performance report unlinked passenger trips

stages.purpose: Use the resolved organization to locate a primary document for the requested fact.
Read the primary document itself rather than treating a snippet as evidence.

arguments.query: site:kingsmere-transit.fixture 2025 ridership report official archive unlinked trips

stages.purpose: Find a different official copy after the injected retrieval failure.
Fetch the alternate primary source and ground the answer in it.

response_constraints: Cite the fetched primary-source URL rather than a search-results page.
Treat search snippets as navigation aids, not final evidence.
Separate sourced facts from any inference.
Report exactly 6,284,190 unlinked passenger trips and cite the alternate official report.
Do not restate the figure as unique riders or retry the failed URL.

prompt: Identify the official transit operator for Kingsmere, then verify from a fetched primary 2025 performance report how many unlinked passenger trips it recorded. Use the report’s exact measure and do not convert it to riders. If the first report fails, find an alternate official copy.

search_2.query: site:kingsmere-transit.fixture 2025 performance report unlinked passenger trips

alternate_search.query: site:kingsmere-transit.fixture 2025 ridership report official archive unlinked trips

fetch_2.title: 2025 Service Statistics
fetch_2.content: Kingsmere Transit Authority recorded 6,284,190 unlinked passenger trips in calendar year 2025. This measure counts each boarding, not unique riders.
